title: • Career Reflection: The author realized they were delaying their dream
content:
• Career Reflection: The author realized they were delaying their dreams and not living in alignment with their values.
  • Life Challenges: The author has faced numerous hardships, including a near-death experience, family conflicts, and struggles with identity and purpose.
  • Current Situation: The author is currently living with their mother, who is demanding they leave, while the author is trying to focus on their goals and personal growth.
  • Career Aspirations: The author is determined to pursue their own path and avoid unfulfilling work, expressing a desire to work for individuals rather than corporations.
context: From document: Title: Surviving Collapse — chunk 4 (chunk 4/4)
